TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Arron_Afflalo, title = Arron_Afflalo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arron_Afflalo} }

S.FORM: == Arron Afflalo == 10 bulad 15 demiad, 1985 a mihca, Arron Afflalo, miunduay. Arron Afflalo nalecuhan i Los Angeles, California. Arron Afflalo unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay, adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Arron Afflalo i 2007 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 27, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput.
S.PHON: == arron affr~…æar~…æo == ** bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, arron affr~…æar~…æo, miunduaj. arron affr~…æar~…æo nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i r~…æos a≈ã…ôr~…æ…ôs, ¶ar~…æifornia. arron affr~…æar~…æo unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj, u mikir~…æa ¶ zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj, adidi î~ °aj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. arron affr~…æar~…æo i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu d…ôtroit pistons putiput.
S.FORM: == Arron Afflalo == 10 bulad 15 demiad, 1985 a mihca, Arron Afflalo, miunduay. Arron Afflalo nalecuhan i Los Angeles, California. Arron Afflalo unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay, u mikilac zikuzay mimaliay, adidi'ay ayaway mimaliay. Arron Afflalo i 2007 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 27, namapili' tu nu Detroit Pistons putiput.
